subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the creation and the command, His the sovereignty and dominion, and His the grandeur and majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و له الملک و الملکوت و العظمه و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of prayer, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @unity; oneness of humanity
